item.title: Newsletter
item.description:
Subscribe to Riclivo.online

Get the top trending stories in Tech, AI, Health, Finance, Entertainment, Football and Sports delivered to your inbox daily. No spam, ever. Unsubscribe anytime.

Join thousands of readers who stay ahead of the news with Riclivo.online — a RicLivo Technologies Media platform.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy — Riclivo.online

Last updated: April 12, 2026

Riclivo.online is operated by RicLivo Technologies. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you visit our blog.

Information We Collect

Information you provide voluntarily: When you subscribe to our newsletter or submit a comment through our Google Form, we collect your name and email address. This information is stored securely in Google Sheets and used only to deliver the newsletter and respond to your comments.

item.title: AI's Disruption in Newsrooms: A Double-Edged Sword
item.description: Artificial intelligence is reshaping newsrooms faster than you can say “breaking news.” We’re witnessing a seismic shift in how journalism operates, with tech companies and news outlets racing to leve

item.title: My First Post
item.description:
I checked comments on a viral video… something feels off

I was going through comments on a trending video and noticed something weird.

A lot of them looked almost identical. Same kind of wording, same tone.

Not saying they’re bots for sure… but it made me question how real comment sections actually are.

Has anyone else noticed this?
